response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the Reference JSON for the lyrics of both 'Dawn Blue' and '罪と蜜'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for song lyrics; manual transcription and translation were performed for the talking segment and title card text. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are precisely anchored to vocal bursts, with aggressive truncation used for rapid-fire lyrics and seamless transitions between speakers in the dialogue segment.

subtitles.english: Us against tomorrow

subtitles.original: Thank you so much Sora-senpai! Mata issho ni utaimashou!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much Sora-senpai! Let's sing together again!

subtitles.original: おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Congratulations!

subtitles.original: Thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: Bye-bye! またね！
subtitles.english: Bye-bye! See you!

subtitles.original: See you!
subtitles.english: See you!

subtitles.original: うわあ、楽しいね、生ライブ！
subtitles.english: Wow, live shows are fun, aren't they?

subtitles.original: Oh man, this is so fun. I just love singing.
subtitles.english: Oh man, this is so fun. I just love singing.

subtitles.original: I love singing live so much, and you guys, thank you for being a part of it.
subtitles.english: I love singing live so much, and you guys, thank you for being a part of it.

subtitles.original: Woo! Nailed it, you think so?
subtitles.english: Woo! Nailed it, you think so?

subtitles.original: Because Sora-senpai was by my side. It was awesome.
subtitles.english: Because Sora-senpai was by my side. It was awesome.

subtitles.original: Now next, I'll be singing with a surprise secret guest, but...
subtitles.english: Now next, I'll be singing with a surprise secret guest, but...

subtitles.original: ...it's a bit of a break for myself and the band right now because...
subtitles.english: ...it's a bit of a break for myself and the band right now because...

subtitles.original: ...we're going to go back in time to a time when I recorded something with a special guest...
subtitles.english: ...we're going to go back in time to a time when I recorded something with a special guest...

subtitles.original: ...with the power of technology. You'll understand what I mean but...
subtitles.english: ...with the power of technology. You'll understand what I mean but...

subtitles.original: ...let's go back in the past, and myself and the band are going to chill for a minute.
subtitles.english: ...let's go back in the past, and myself and the band are going to chill for a minute.

subtitles.original: So please enjoy that special guest performance and I'll see you guys soon...
subtitles.english: So please enjoy that special guest performance and I'll see you guys soon...

subtitles.original: ...for the next live one very shortly. Okay.
subtitles.english: ...for the next live one very shortly. Okay.

subtitles.original: See you then. どうぞ！
